option.name: originalContent
option.value:
name: Docker Monthly Release
on: schedule: - cron: "0 3 1 * *" workflow_dispatch:
permissions: contents: read packages: write
jobs: release-full: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Set vars id: vars run: | echo "image_name=$(echo ghcr.io/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY} | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" echo "date_tag=version-$(date -u +%Y%m%d)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
- name: Set up Docker Buildx uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
- name: Log in to GHCR uses: docker/login-action@v3 with: registry: ghcr.io username: ${{ github.actor }} password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
- name: Build and push full image (init already run) uses: docker/build-push-action@v6 with: context: . file: Dockerfile target: runtime push: true tags: ${{ steps.vars.outputs.image_name }}:${{ steps.vars.outputs.date_tag }}

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: Docker Monthly Release
on: schedule: - cron: "0 3 1 * *" workflow_dispatch:
permissions: contents: read packages: write
jobs: release-full: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Set vars id: vars run: | PROJECT_VERSION=$(sed -n 's/^version\s*=\s*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p' build.gradle.kts | head -n1) if [ -z "$PROJECT_VERSION" ]; then echo "Unable to extract version from build.gradle.kts" >&2 exit 1 fi echo "image_name=$(echo ghcr.io/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY} | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" echo "project_version=$PROJECT_VERSION" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" echo "date_tag=${PROJECT_VERSION}-$(date -u +%Y%m%d)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
- name: Set up Docker Buildx uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
- name: Log in to GHCR uses: docker/login-action@v3 with: registry: ghcr.io username: ${{ github.actor }} password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
- name: Build and push full image (init already run) uses: docker/build-push-action@v6 with: context: . file: Dockerfile target: runtime push: true tags: ${{ steps.vars.outputs.image_name }}:${{ steps.vars.outputs.date_tag }}

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
name: Docker Push Release
on: push:
permissions: contents: read packages: write
jobs: release-images: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Set vars id: vars run: | echo "image_name=$(echo ghcr.io/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY} | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" echo "date_tag=version-$(date -u +%Y%m%d)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
- name: Set up Docker Buildx uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
- name: Log in to GHCR uses: docker/login-action@v3 with: registry: ghcr.io username: ${{ github.actor }} password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
- name: Build and push lightweight image (no init) uses: docker/build-push-action@v6 with: context: . file: Dockerfile target: lightweight push: true tags: ${{ steps.vars.outputs.image_name }}:version
- name: Build and push init/full image uses: docker/build-push-action@v6 with: context: . file: Dockerfile target: runtime push: true tags: ${{ steps.vars.outputs.image_name }}:${{ steps.vars.outputs.date_tag }}

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
